glosses.ja: 才能; 才能のある人

translations.fr: Elle a du talent pour le dessin.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在绘画方面很有天赋。
translations.yue: 佢喺畫畫方面好有天分。
translations.vi: Cô ấy có năng khiếu vẽ.
translations.hi: उसके पास चित्र बनाने की प्रतिभा है.
translations.nb: Hun har talent for å tegne.
translations.sv: Hon har talang för att rita.
translations.da: Hun har talent for at tegne.
translations.ja: 彼女には絵の才能があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause (can be feminine 3sg or formal 2sg).
Finite main verb (present, 3sg) expressing possession; agrees with the subject ‘Sie’.
Common noun, neuter, singular; accusative direct object of ‘hat’, complemented by the PP ‘im Zeichnen’.
Contracted preposition + article (‘in dem’); introduces a dative PP modifying ‘Talent’.
Nominalized infinitive (treated as noun), neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘im’, indicating the domain.

sentences.target: Ich schätze sein Talent beim Kochen.

translations.de: Ich schätze sein Talent beim Kochen.
translations.en: I appreciate his talent in cooking.
translations.fr: J'apprécie son talent pour la cuisine.
translations.it: Apprezzo il suo talento in cucina.
translations.ko: 나는 그의 요리 재능을 높이 평가해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我欣赏他在烹饪方面的才华。
translations.yue: 我欣赏佢喺煮嘢方面嘅天分。
translations.ru: Я ценю его талант в кулинарии.
translations.pt: Eu aprecio o talento dele na culinária.
translations.he: אני מעריך את הכישרון שלו בבישול.
translations.tr: Onun yemek yapma yeteneğini takdir ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đánh giá cao tài nấu ăn của anh ấy.
translations.nl: Ik waardeer zijn talent voor koken.
translations.uk: Я ціную його талант у кулінарії.
translations.hi: मैं उसके खाना बनाने की प्रतिभा की सराहना करता हूँ.
translations.el: Εκτιμώ το ταλέντο του στη μαγειρική.
translations.nb: Jeg setter pris på talentet hans for matlaging.
translations.sv: Jag uppskattar hans talang för matlagning.
translations.da: Jeg værdsætter hans talent for madlavning.
translations.ja: 私は彼の料理の才能を評価しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative, 1sg; subject of ‘schätze’.
Finite main verb (present, 1sg); head of the predicate meaning ‘to value/appreciate’.
Possessive determiner (3sg masc/neut possessor), attributive; modifies ‘Talent’ in the accusative NP.
Common noun, neuter, singular; accusative direct object of ‘schätze’.
Contracted preposition + article (‘bei dem’); introduces a dative PP specifying the activity context.
Nominalized infinitive, neuter, dative singular; object of ‘beim’, indicating the domain of the talent.

sentences.target: Unser Talent hilft uns im Team.

translations.de: Unser Talent hilft uns im Team.
translations.en: Our talent helps us in the team.
translations.es: Nuestro talento nos ayuda como equipo.
translations.fr: Notre talent nous aide en équipe.
translations.it: Il nostro talento ci aiuta in squadra.
translations.ko: 우리의 재능은 팀에서 우리에게 도움이 돼요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的才华在团队中帮助我们。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅才能喺團隊入面幫到我哋。
translations.ru: Наш талант помогает нам в команде.
translations.pt: Nosso talento nos ajuda na equipe.
translations.vi: Tài năng của chúng tôi giúp chúng tôi trong đội.
translations.nl: Ons talent helpt ons in het team.
translations.uk: Наш талант допомагає нам у команді.
translations.hu: A tehetségünk segít nekünk a csapatban.
translations.hi: हमारी प्रतिभा टीम में हमारी मदद करती है.
translations.pl: Nasz talent pomaga nam w zespole.
translations.el: Το ταλέντο μας μας βοηθά στην ομάδα.
translations.nb: Talentet vårt hjelper oss i teamet.
translations.id: Bakat kami membantu kami dalam tim.
translations.sv: Vår talang hjälper oss i laget.
translations.ro: Talentul nostru ne ajută în echipă.
translations.cs: Náš talent nám pomáhá v týmu.
translations.da: Vores talent hjælper os på holdet.
translations.ja: 私たちの才能はチームで役に立ちます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, attributive; modifies ‘Talent’ (nominative neuter singular).
Common noun, neuter, singular; nominative subject of ‘hilft’.
Finite main verb (present, 3sg); takes a dative object (‘uns’).
Personal pronoun, 1pl dative; indirect/dative object of ‘hilft’.
Contracted preposition + article (‘in dem’); introduces a dative PP indicating location/context.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of ‘im’, giving the locative setting.

translations.en: Talent alone is often not enough.
translations.es: El talento por sí solo a menudo no basta.
translations.fr: Le talent seul ne suffit souvent pas.
translations.it: Il talento da solo spesso non basta.
translations.pt: Só talento muitas vezes não basta.
translations.tr: Tek başına yetenek çoğu zaman yetmez.
translations.vi: Chỉ có tài năng thường là chưa đủ.
translations.nl: Alleen talent is vaak niet genoeg.
translations.hu: A puszta tehetség gyakran nem elég.
translations.hi: सिर्फ प्रतिभा अक्सर पर्याप्त नहीं होती.
translations.el: Το ταλέντο μόνο του συχνά δεν αρκεί.
translations.nb: Talent alene er ofte ikke nok.
translations.id: Bakat saja sering kali tidak cukup.
translations.ro: Doar talentul adesea nu este suficient.
translations.da: Talent alene er ofte ikke nok.
translations.ja: 才能だけではしばしば足りません。

tokens.explanation: Common noun, neuter, singular; nominative subject of ‘reicht’.
Adverb functioning as a postnominal focus modifier (‘only/alone’) of the NP ‘Talent’.
Finite main verb (present, 3sg); head of the predicate meaning ‘to be enough/suffice’.
Frequency adverb modifying the predicate.
Negation particle providing sentential negation; scopes over the predicate ‘reicht’.
